'''âw-ch-k''' ('''kawachak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarl|yarl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarl|yarl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-ch-k
|-
! Lemma
| kawachak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwachak|thiwachak]] || [[word:jiwachak|jiwachak]] || [[word:shiwachak|shiwachak]] || [[word:kiwachak|kiwachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwachak|thuthuwachak]] || [[word:jujuwachak|jujuwachak]] || [[word:shushuwachak|shushuwachak]] || [[word:kukuwachak|kukuwachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwachak|thuwachak]] || [[word:juwachak|juwachak]] || [[word:shuwachak|shuwachak]] || [[word:kuwachak|kuwachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwachak|thuwachak]] || [[word:juwachak|juwachak]] || [[word:shuwachak|shuwachak]] || [[word:kuwachak|kuwachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewachak|thewachak]] || [[word:jewachak|jewachak]] || [[word:shewachak|shewachak]] || [[word:kewachak|kewachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowachak|thothowachak]] || [[word:jojowachak|jojowachak]] || [[word:shoshowachak|shoshowachak]] || [[word:kokowachak|kokowachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowachak|thowachak]] || [[word:jowachak|jowachak]] || [[word:showachak|showachak]] || [[word:kowachak|kowachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowachak|thowachak]] || [[word:jowachak|jowachak]] || [[word:showachak|showachak]] || [[word:kowachak|kowachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwachak|thĂŠwachak]] || [[word:jĂŠwachak|jĂŠwachak]] || [[word:shĂŠwachak|shĂŠwachak]] || [[word:kĂŠwachak|kĂŠwachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawachak|thathawachak]] || [[word:jajawachak|jajawachak]] || [[word:shashawachak|shashawachak]] || [[word:kakawachak|kakawachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawachak|thawachak]] || [[word:jawachak|jawachak]] || [[word:shawachak|shawachak]] || [[word:kawachak|kawachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawachak|thawachak]] || [[word:jawachak|jawachak]] || [[word:shawachak|shawachak]] || [[word:kawachak|kawachak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawachak|shawachak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawachak|goshawachak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawachak|gokishawachak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawachaknĂŒ|shawachaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawachaknknĂŒ|goshawachaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachaknĂŒ|gokishawachaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawachakshĂ«|shawachakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawachaknkshĂ«|goshawachaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawachakshĂ«|gokishawachakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachakro|shawachakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachaknkro|goshawachaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachakro|gokishawachakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachakmu|shawachakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachaknkmu|goshawachaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachakmu|gokishawachakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawachaksher|shawachaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawachaknksher|goshawachaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawachaksher|gokishawachaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawachakng|shawachakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawachaknkng|goshawachaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawachakng|gokishawachakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawachakya|shawachakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawachaknkya|goshawachaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawachakya|gokishawachakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawachakyam|shawachakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawachaknkyam|goshawachaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawachakyam|gokishawachakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawachaknĂŒshĂ«|shawachaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawachaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshawachaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawachaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishawachaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachaknĂŒro|shawachaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachaknknĂŒro|goshawachaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachaknĂŒro|gokishawachaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachaknĂŒmu|shawachaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachaknknĂŒmu|goshawachaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachaknĂŒmu|gokishawachaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawachakshĂ«nĂŒ|shawachakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawachaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawachaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawachakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachakshĂ«ro|shawachakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachaknkshĂ«ro|goshawachaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachakshĂ«ro|gokishawachakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachakshĂ«mu|shawachakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachaknkshĂ«mu|goshawachaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachakshĂ«mu|gokishawachakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawachakronĂŒ|shawachakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawachaknkronĂŒ|goshawachaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachakronĂŒ|gokishawachakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawachakroshĂ«|shawachakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawachaknkroshĂ«|goshawachaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawachakroshĂ«|gokishawachakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachakromu|shawachakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachaknkromu|goshawachaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachakromu|gokishawachakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawachakmunĂŒ|shawachakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawachaknkmunĂŒ|goshawachaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachakmunĂŒ|gokishawachakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawachakmushĂ«|shawachakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawachaknkmushĂ«|goshawachaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawachakmushĂ«|gokishawachakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachakmuro|shawachakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachaknkmuro|goshawachaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachakmuro|gokishawachakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
